<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please make sure your PR title follows Conventional Commits
(e.g. "feat: ...", "fix: ...", "docs: ..."), since releases and the changelog are generated from it.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for details.
-->

## Description

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Breaking change (`!` / `BREAKING CHANGE:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor / chore / CI (no release)

## Checklist

- [ ] My commit messages and PR title follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `./gradlew build` passes locally
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] I updated the documentation where needed
